title: 151 Products Limited Adhesive Pads, Wood, 182023 cm
features: 151 Love Your Wood 33 Assorted anti-skid pads
description: These self adhesive pads help to protect your wooden or laminate floor from furniture scratches and prevent your furniture from sliding around. They come as a pack of 33 assorted sizes (see below for breakdown) and can be cut down further to required size. These are brand new and come in a sealed pack.Pack Contains: 12 x 25mm Diameter circular pads 4 x 37mm Diameter circular pads 16 x 20mm x 20mm square pads 1 x 95mm x 95mm square pad, cut to desired sizes
